channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mamdani Wave Fuels AOC 2028 Buzz
item.description: Democratic insiders say a clean sweep by NYC Mayor Mamdani's three endorsed House candidates on Tuesday has shifted Rep. Ocasio-Cortez, D-N.Y., toward...

item.title: Nigel Farage: Mass Migration Has Now Dramatically Changed Britain
Rep. Malliotakis to Newsmax: NYC Dems Signal Socialist Shift
item.description: Rep. Nicole Malliotakis, R-N.Y., warned Sat. on Newsmax that three Democrat socialists are now all but certain to enter Congress next year after sweep...

item.title: Millions Drop Obamacare Coverage After Subsidies Expire
item.description: About 3 million fewer people in the United States had Affordable Care Act health insurance plans in February compared with the same time last year, ac...
